steps.html_instructions: Head east on Spruce St toward S Mulberry St
Turn left onto D & L Trail - Lehigh Canal Towpath
Turn right to stay on D & L Trail - Lehigh Canal Towpath

Turn left toward Delaware Rd
Entering New Jersey
Bridge St turns slightly right and becomes Frenchtown Rd

Continue onto Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
Passing through Pennsylvania
Entering New Jersey

Continue onto Lumberville-Raven Rock Bridge
Entering Pennsylvania
Slight right to stay on Delaware Canal Towpath/D&L Trail

Turn left onto E Bridge St
Entering New Jersey

Turn right onto Canal St/Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
Continue to follow Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail

Turn right to stay on Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
Passing through Pennsylvania
Entering New Jersey

Turn right onto PA-32 S/N Delaware Ave
Continue to follow PA-32 S

Turn left onto Delaware Canal Towpath/D&L Trail
Continue to follow D&L Trail
Turn left to stay on Delaware Canal Towpath/D&L Trl
Turn right onto Delaware Canal Towpath/D & L Trail

routes.summary: Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
warnings: Bicycling directions are in beta. Use caution – This route may contain streets that aren't suited for bicycling.
